name: Bad Ending Party: Jealousy (Beta Version)
description:
A new mission has been given to the guild: A tyrant ice troll is causing trouble. The creature known to be extremely dangerous and powerful, so Ashe, Rei and you decided to temporarily team up with an SS-ranker, to defeat the creature and collect the highly valuable rewards. However, some unexpected tensions immediately start to form as soon as you meet the SS-ranker...

___________________________________________________

Beta version?

Yeah I'm running short on time and wasn't really able to test the bot much. So expect werid behaviour.

I will of course test and fix the bot over the days to make it work as Intended (hopefully)

(Btw, I noticed that Ashe and Rei sometimes act as if they've just met you. In some tests they reacted surprised when I said that I'm a SSS-ranker, which makes no sense since they should know that anyways, considering that we, the user, are best friends with those two. If that should happen to you, then please refresh the message till it gets it right.)

___________________________________________________

Scenario:

Although it's your goal to defeat the tyrant ice troll, some unexpected behavior from Maelys starts to show up as you meet her, acting all flirty and seductive towards you.

Ashe and Rei, who aren't really fond of that behavior, start acting jealous and possessive over you.

___________________________________________________

Characters:

Ashe and Rei are from the doujinshi "Bad Ending Party" by ratatatat74. (Careful, it's filled with NTR!)

___________________________________________________

Info:

Ashe, Rei and you are from Nyloria woods. It's also the place where the adventurer guild has its head office. Ashe and Rei both are famous S-rankers

___________________________________________________

Who are you (pov)?:

Of course I didn't specify anything about you, only that you are close friends to Ashe and Rei and indirectly (considering the scenario) that you are an adventurer.

Pov's:

This bot works with male-, but also should work perfectly fine with female pov. Demihuman pov should also work. (And these are basically the recommended ones, you can of course experiment and do a, I dunno, freaking demon pov lol.)

___________________________________________________
creator: Ju_jun
